name: skills
description: Personal agent skill collection: doc-feat-desc, draft-to-project, git-smart-commit, global-project-rules, split-pencil-file.

plugins.name: doc-feat-desc
plugins.description: Use when the user wants user-facing docs for an implemented feature. Inspect the real implementation first, then write help-center, site-copy, and in-product docs under doc/<requirement-name>.

plugins.name: draft-to-project
plugins.description: Convert UI drafts such as screenshots, HTML drafts, local file:// prototype pages, or mockups into frontend pages inside an existing project while keeping the draft layout structure close to the source.

plugins.name: git-smart-commit
plugins.description: Use when the user wants a commit message or wants to refine one. Detect the repo's commit convention first, then generate a matching header; include a short body when one intent spans multiple areas.

plugins.name: global-project-rules
plugins.description: Use as always-on project rules for agent behavior in any repository: Chinese replies, senior engineer style, simple maintainable solutions, clear APIs, and no state-changing git commands unless explicitly requested.

plugins.name: split-pencil-file
plugins.description: Split an imported Pencil .pen design file into one folder per top-level Frame, each containing index.pen and the local image assets referenced by that frame.
